name: IRC_MP_GIGS_B
description: The table that contains the properties of gigs

columns.Name: GIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the Gig which is unique to each gig

columns.Name: GIG_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Gig number is associated with each gig that is visible to the user

columns.Name: GIG_MANAGER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The id that represents the employee who is the gig manager. Foreign key to the table PER_PERSONS

columns.Name: CREATOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The id that represents the employee who created the gig. Foreign key to the table PER_PERSONS

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The start date of the gig when the work commences.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The target date of the gig by which we expect it to be finished

columns.Name: PUBLISH_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when gig is open for the opportunity seeker

columns.Name: TIME_COMMITMENT
columns.Comments: The amount of time we expect a team member to commit for the gig

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: The code of the status that represents the gig state.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table.

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_GEO_HIER_NODES table.

columns.Name: REMOTE_OPPORTUNITY_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag that represents whether a gig is a remote opportunity ot not

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Represents the status of the object

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Obsolete column, please use GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID column for persisting gig location.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the corresponding job profile ID. Foreign key to HRT_PROFILES_B table.

columns.Name: OPENINGS_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column represents the number of applications that can be assigned for a given Gig

columns.Name: FILLED_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column represents the number of assigned applications for a given Gig

columns.Name: CLASSIFY_ORG_ID
columns.Comments: To store organization id for gig classification purpose.Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table.

columns.Name: CLASSIFY_BU_ID
columns.Comments: To store business unit id for gig classification purpose. Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table

columns.Name: CLASSIFY_JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: To store job family id for gig classification purpose. Foreign key to per_job_family_f table

columns.Name: CLASSIFY_JOB_FUNC_CODE
columns.Comments: To store job function lookup code for gig classification purpose. The corresponding lookup type is JOB_FUNCTION_CODE

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
